title: armeria maritima var. pubinervis
intro: Armeria maritima var. pubinervis, also known as the sea thrift or sea pink, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family, native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. pubinervis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
